label: archery
context: archery: the sport of shooting arrows with a bow

label: basketball
context: basketball: a game played on a court by two opposing teams of 5 players; points are scored by throwing the ball through an elevated horizontal hoop

label: billiards
context: billiards: any of several games played on rectangular cloth-covered table (with cushioned edges) in which long tapering cue sticks are used to propel ivory (or composition) balls

label: bowling
context: bowling: a game in which balls are rolled at an object or group of objects with the aim of knocking them over or moving them

label: breaststroke
context: breaststroke: a swimming stroke; the arms are extended together in front of the head and swept back on either side accompanied by a frog kick

label: diving
context: diving: an athletic competition that involves diving into water

label: drumming
context: drumming: the act of playing drums

label: fencing
context: fencing: a barrier that serves to enclose an area

label: haircut
context: haircut: the style in which hair has been cut

label: hammering
context: hammering: the act of pounding (delivering repeated heavy blows)

label: kayaking
context: kayaking: travel in a small canoe

label: knitting
context: knitting: needlework created by interlacing yarn in a series of connected loops using straight eyeless needles or by machine

label: lunges
context: lunges: the act of moving forward suddenly

label: mixing
context: mixing: the act of mixing together

label: punch
context: punch: (boxing) a blow with the fist

label: pushups
context: pushups: an arm exercise performed lying face to the floor and pushing the body up and down with the arms

label: rowing
context: rowing: the act of rowing as a sport

label: skateboarding
context: skateboarding: the sport of skating on a skateboard

label: skiing
context: skiing: a sport in which participants must travel on skis

label: skydiving
context: skydiving: performing acrobatics in free fall before pulling the ripcord of a parachute

label: surfing
context: surfing: the sport of riding a surfboard toward the shore on the crest of a wave

label: swing
context: swing: a state of steady vigorous action that is characteristic of an activity

label: taichi
context: taichi: a Chinese system of slow meditative physical exercise designed for relaxation and balance and health

label: typing
context: typing: writing done with a typewriter

label: brush hair
context: hair: a covering for the body (or parts of it) consisting of a dense growth of threadlike structures (as on the human head); helps to prevent heat loss

label: cartwheel
context: cartwheel: a wheel that has wooden spokes and a metal rim

label: catch
context: catch: a drawback or difficulty that is not readily evident

label: chew
context: chew: a wad of something chewable as tobacco

label: clap
context: clap: a sudden very loud noise

label: climb stairs
context: stairs: a flight of stairs or a flight of steps

label: climb
context: climb: an upward slope or grade (as in a road)

label: dive
context: dive: a cheap disreputable nightclub or dance hall

label: draw sword
context: sword: a cutting or thrusting weapon that has a long metal blade and a hilt with a hand guard

label: dribble
context: dribble: flowing in drops; the formation and falling of drops of liquid

label: drink
context: drink: a single serving of a beverage

label: fall floor
context: floor: the inside lower horizontal surface (as of a room, hallway, tent, or other structure)

label: golf
context: golf: a game played on a large open course with 9 or 18 holes; the object is use as few strokes as possible in playing all the holes

label: handstand
context: handstand: the act of supporting yourself by your hands alone in an upside down position

label: hit
context: hit: (baseball) a successful stroke in an athletic contest (especially in baseball)

label: hug
context: hug: a tight or amorous embrace

label: jump
context: jump: a sudden and decisive increase

label: kick ball
context: ball: round object that is hit or thrown or kicked in games

label: kick
context: kick: the act of delivering a blow with the foot

label: kiss
context: kiss: the act of caressing with the lips (or an instance thereof)

label: pick
context: pick: the person or thing chosen or selected

label: push

label: pushup
context: pushup: an arm exercise performed lying face to the floor and pushing the body up and down with the arms

label: ride bike
context: bike: a motor vehicle with two wheels and a strong frame

label: ride horse
context: horse: solid-hoofed herbivorous quadruped domesticated since prehistoric times

label: run
context: run: a score in baseball made by a runner touching all four bases safely

label: shake hands
context: hands: (with `in') guardianship over; in divorce cases it is the right to house and care for and discipline a child

label: shoot ball
context: ball: round object that is hit or thrown or kicked in games

label: shoot bow
context: bow: a knot with two loops and loose ends; used to tie shoelaces

label: shoot gun
context: gun: a weapon that discharges a missile at high velocity (especially from a metal tube or barrel)

label: smile
context: smile: a facial expression characterized by turning up the corners of the mouth; usually shows pleasure or amusement

label: smoke
context: smoke: a cloud of fine particles suspended in a gas

label: somersault
context: somersault: an acrobatic feat in which the feet roll over the head (either forward or backward) and return

label: swing baseball
context: baseball: a ball game played with a bat and ball between two teams of nine players; teams take turns at bat trying to score runs

context: exercise: the activity of exerting your muscles in various ways to keep fit

label: sword
context: sword: a cutting or thrusting weapon that has a long metal blade and a hilt with a hand guard

label: talk
context: talk: an exchange of ideas via conversation

label: throw
context: throw: the act of throwing (propelling something with a rapid movement of the arm and wrist)

label: turn
context: turn: a circular segment of a curve
